hyperedges.rationale: AgentMessage[] -> transformContext -> convertToLlm -> Message[] -> streamSimple is the single LLM-boundary pipeline shared by the agent loop.
Tool calls flow prepareToolCall (validate + beforeToolCall block) -> execute -> finalizeExecutedToolCall (afterToolCall merge), orchestrated by executeToolCalls in parallel/sequential modes.
AgentHarness design is split across lifecycle (phases/save-points), hooks (extension mutation), and durability (session-as-state-tree/recovery) docs that mutually reference each other.
Gemini and Vertex share thought-signature streaming + Gemini-3 disabled-thinking rules via google-shared helpers.
All providers resolve config (region, baseUrl, credentials) through getProviderEnvValue, which has a Bun sandbox /proc/self/environ fallback.
Every provider returns an AssistantMessageEventStream (extends generic EventStream); lazy loaders wrap them and per-provider consumers translate vendor events into pi events.

hyperedges.label: Shared provider test infrastructure: OAuth/API-key/credential helpers (oauth.ts, azure-utils.ts, bedrock-utils.ts, cloudflare-utils.ts)
Cache-affinity concern cluster: session-id/prompt_cache_key headers + 64-char clamp across OpenAI/Azure/Codex Responses providers
Cross-provider compatibility verification chain: tool-call-id normalization + thinking serialization + context handoff

hyperedges.relation: All three extensions mutate the system prompt via the before_agent_start hook
Extensions that re-register built-in read/write/edit/bash tools by delegating to createXTool factories
Extensions that persist/reconstruct state through the SessionManager (entries, branches, labels)
doom-overlay runtime pipeline (WAD load -> WASM engine -> half-block render)
GitLab Duo auth+stream chain (OAuth -> direct access token -> backend-delegated stream)
three distinct tool-isolation strategies (micro-VM / OS sandbox / subprocess) sharing the ExtensionAPI surface
scout->planner->worker chain shares context via {previous} placeholder
Core service trio fed into createAgentSession for full agent configuration
DefaultResourceLoader override hooks (systemPrompt/skills/contextFiles/prompts) customize agent resources
assembles AgentSession from registries and extensions
context compaction pipeline: prepare, cut, summarize
HTML export pipeline: pre-render tools, ANSI convert, inject vendored libs into template

hyperedges.description: Reusable interactive UI components all depend on the shared theme singleton and the DynamicBorder / keybinding-hints primitives
RPC mode end-to-end: client serializes commands over strict LF-only JSONL; server (runRpcMode) parses the same protocol types and emits responses/events
Theme color pipeline: terminal detection chooses default theme, init sets a cross-loader globalThis singleton that proxies to a Theme which quantizes hex to truecolor/256-color ANSI
